source: 阮氏金银女士在授勋仪式上发表讲话时强调，越老两个民族之间密不可分的关系是从源远流长的历史进程中形成的，越南与老挝两国人民之间的良好传统友谊、始终如一以及无私的关系由胡志明主席和凯山·丰威汉主席亲手缔造和两党、两国历届领导和人民精心培育的，成为两国无价之宝。
target: In her speech at the honours ceremony, Ms. Nguyen Thi Jinyin stressed that the inseparable relationship between the two ethnic groups was formed from a long history. The good traditional friendship, consistent and selfless relationship between the peoples of Vietnam and Laos was personally created by President Ho Chi Minh and President Kaishan Fung Weihan and carefully nurtured by the leaders and people of the two parties and the two countries. It has become a priceless treasure of the two countries.
